judgment.summary: Rapidly growing, highly profitable social media platform with strong margins and a solid balance sheet.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 79.1%; next earnings date is 2026-07-30.
positives: Revenue growth 69.1% YoY — exceptional top-line expansion.
Quarterly earnings growth 679.8% — demonstrates significant profitability improvements.
Gross margin 91.4% and Profit margin 28.6% — industry-leading profitability.
Free cash flow $564.09M — strong cash generation supports growth.
Forward P/E 17.18x vs Trailing P/E 43.23x — valuation is attractive relative to expected future earnings.
negatives: Beta 1.85 — stock exhibits higher volatility than the broader market.
Price/Sales (TTM) 11.81x — valuation remains high on a sales basis.
Debt/Equity 0.67 — while manageable, leverage is present.

news.paragraph: Reddit (RDDT) has no recent headlines, leaving its current trading action to be driven by its underlying business performance and market sentiment. The next earnings date is July 30th, which could serve as a catalyst for price movement. Traders should monitor broader market trends and any shifts in analyst sentiment leading up to the report.
